ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY,INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Continued To Jun-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
